svg.title: Operational Document Dependency Graph
svg.desc: Shows how the eight operational documents reference each other — the Service Catalogue is the foundational reference, feeding three mid-tier documents that converge on Incident Response, which fans out to three specialized documents.

span.p:
ADR-134: Service Catalogue
manual — foundational reference
